sql_array: CREATE TABLE file_data (id INTEGER, file_path VARCHAR);
UPDATE file_data SET file_path = parse_filename(file_path, true, 'system') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT parse_filename(file_path, false, 'both_slash') AS filename FROM file_data;
SELECT id, parse_filename(file_path, true, 'forward_slash') AS trimmed_filename FROM file_data WHERE id = 1;
